title: Frikinzi's Fauna
description: A mod that adds a plethora of birds and other small creatures to your Minecraft world.
body:
_Are you bored by the lack of wildlife in Minecraft?_ _Are you looking to build a zoo and want to fill your aviaries and aquariums?_ _Did you always want a golden eagle or barn owl to fight beside you in survival mode?_ Then this is the mod for you! **Frikinzi's Fauna** (for 1.12.2, 1.16.5 and 1.18.2) adds a variety of real life animals to Minecraft that are not usually found in other animal mods with a focus on avian and water creatures. Over **500 species** are represented! You can find many of these animals while exploring the jungles, forests, tundras, wastelands, and coasts in your Minecraft world, and tame and breed many of them! **Become a true naturalist!** Discover, catalog, and learn about hundreds of real-world birds and aquatic creatures in your very own Field Guide. Can you find them all? (1.20.1) **Follow our socials!** [](https://discord.gg/xArJJrAkBg) [](https://www.instagram.com/frikinzis_fauna/) **This mod will require [GeckoLib 3.0.0+](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)!** **Please report bugs to the [Github issue tracker](https://github.com/frikinzi/frikinzis_fauna/issues) or in the discord server #issues channel.** **Supported languages:** English (US), Español (España), 简体中文, 繁體中文, Português (Brasil), 日本語, Français (Want to help with translations? Join the Discord server and contact me!) The mod currently has 50 animals as of the 1.4.0 update. Learn more about them in-game using Frikinzi's Guide or [the wiki](https://github.com/frikinzi/frikinzis_fauna/wiki).
How to craft and use the guide: ![](https://i.imgur.com/5GsYf6b.png) After you've obtained the green book above, right click an animal from the mod with the book in hand to learn more about the animal's species and diet. ![](https://i.postimg.cc/2yP1h0HT/2025-01-02-21-11-40.png)
FAQ: ## Can you please add x bird or x variant? Feel free to make suggestions in ⁠the suggestions channel in my server. ## My game crashed! First, check that you installed Geckolib and the correct version (3.0.0+ for 1.12.2/1.16/1.18, and using the forge version not the fabric version). If there is another problem, post in the ⁠issues channel in the Discord or on the GitHub issue tracker. ## Will you make the mod for Minecraft version xxx? Please be patient. Updates will be done when they're done. I have a life outside of Minecraft.
